title: Choricha Mamla
overview: Thief breaks in politician's house and politician's affairs are revealed. Based on play by Italian author Dario Fo called Non tutti i ladri vengono a nuocere, translated to Marathi-saglec chor kahi lutayla yet nahi-kelyane bhashantar
